app.title: Show HN: Cactus Hybrid: We taught Gemma 4 to know when it's wrong
app.author: HenryNdubuaku
app.description: Teaching AIs to recognize, admit, and correct errors
proposed_tests: Download and test Cactus Hybrid on a LLM model
Integrate with a popular AI development platform
Evaluate performance on a variety of error types
